zh.Kells, County Meath, Ireland: 愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯凱爾斯
zh.Benenden, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特貝嫩登
zh.Enfield, Middlesex, England: 英國英格蘭米德萊可恩費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Amery Averia de Mortimer於1393年12月27日出生在英國米德萊可恩費爾德時，她的父親Roger Mortimer 4th Earl Of March19歲，母親Eleanor Holand23歲。她於1415年與William Wroth II在英國米德萊可恩費爾德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1434年在英國英格蘭米德萊可恩費爾德享年42歲。

zh-hans.Kells, County Meath, Ireland: 爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯凱爾斯
zh-hans.Benenden, Kent, England: 英国英格兰肯特貝嫩登
zh-hans.Enfield, Middlesex, England: 英国英格兰米德萊可恩費爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Amery Averia de Mortimer于1393年12月27日出生在英国米德萊可恩費爾德时，她的父亲Roger Mortimer 4th Earl Of March19岁，母亲Eleanor Holand23岁。她于1415年与William Wroth II在英国米德萊可恩費爾德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1434年在英国英格兰米德萊可恩費爾德享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mortimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortemer in Seine-Maritime, France, so called from Old French mort(e) ‘dead’ + mer ‘sea’, probably referring to a stagnant pond or drained swamp.

Irish (of Norman origin): the Norman surname in sense 1 above was taken to Ireland from England in the medieval period, where it has also been adopted by bearers of the Gaelic surnames Mac Muircheartaigh and ÓMuircheartaigh, commonly Anglicized as McMurty and Mortagh. Compare McMurdo .

variants.name: Mortimore
meanings: English (Devon; of Norman origin): variant of   Mortimer  .

variants.name: McMurdo
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muircheartaigh or Mac Muircheartaich, ‘son of Muircheartach’, a personal name meaning ‘sea-ruler’. In Scotland the name was often lenited to give McCurdy . Compare Murdoch and Moriarty . The name was also used to Anglicize Mac Murchaidh (see McMorrow ).

nameMeanings.name: Amery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which originated in the Middle Ages from a Norman French pronunciation of   Alfred .  It is used mainly as a boy's name in Britain, while in North America it is more popular as a girl's name.

nameMeanings.name: Averia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Amery Averia de Mortimer was born on 27 December 1393, in Enfield, Middlesex, England, her father, Roger Mortimer 4th Earl Of March, was 19 and her mother, Eleanor Holand, was 23. She married William Wroth II in 1415, in Enfield, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died about 1434, in Enfield, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Amery Averia de Mortimer est née le 27 décembre 1393, à Enfield, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Roger Mortimer 4th Earl Of March, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Holand, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé William Wroth II en 1415, à Enfield, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1434, à Enfield, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Amery Averia de Mortimer am 27. Dezember 1393 in Enfield, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger Mortimer 4th Earl Of March 19 und ihre Mutter Eleanor Holand 23. Sie hat 1415 in Enfield, Middlesex, England William Wroth II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1434 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Enfield, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Amery Averia de Mortimer è nata il il 27 dicembre 1393 nel Enfield, Middlesex, England, sua padre, Roger Mortimer 4th Earl Of March, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Eleanor Holand, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato William Wroth II nel 1415, nel Enfield, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1434, nel Enfield, Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Amery Averia de Mortimerが1393年12月27日にイギリスミッドレセックスエンフィールドで生まれた時，父Roger Mortimer 4th Earl Of Marchは19歳，母Eleanor Holandは23歳であった。1415年にイギリスミッドレセックスエンフィールドでWilliam Wroth IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1434年にイギリスイギリスミッドレセックスエンフィールドで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Amery Averia de Mortimer(이)가 1393년 12월 27일 영국 미들레세스 필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger Mortimer 4th Earl Of March(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Holand(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1415년 영국 미들레세스 필드에서 William Wroth II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1434년 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 필드에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Amery Averia de Mortimer nasceu em 27 de dezembro de 1393, em Enfield, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Mortimer 4th Earl Of March, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Holand, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com William Wroth II em 1415, em Enfield, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1434, em Enfield, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Amery Averia de Mortimer родилась 27 декабря 1393 г. в местности энфиелд, миддлесекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger Mortimer 4th Earl Of March было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Holand, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Wroth II в 1415 г. в местности энфиелд, миддлесекс, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1434 г. в местности энфиелд, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Amery Averia de Mortimer nació el 27 de diciembre de 1393, en Enfield, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Mortimer 4th Earl Of March, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Eleanor Holand, tenía 23 años. Se casó con William Wroth II en 1415, en Enfield, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1434, en Enfield, Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 42 años.
